title: Monday Service - Convert all Inbound text to plain text

posts.author: RSC2026 (Robbie Cain)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Visibility of tickets when an item is submitted via the email channel can be very difficult if the submitter has any special text (ie. Bold). This is especially bad if the service member is using night or dark mode.

What are you trying to achieve

Better overall visibility when clicking into ticket improving the overall experience of service members.
